title: Portfolio, Interview, and Job Strategy
description: This short course helps you turn coursework into job-ready career assets. You’ll clarify a career narrative with an AI-guided dialogue, watch an industry story for inspiration, and read concise guidance on resumes and portfolio curation. The core hands-on lab walks you through selecting 3–5 artifacts, annotating each for measurable impact, and drafting three quantified accomplishment statements plus a targeted LinkedIn/resume summary. You’ll practice high-pressure interview responses in an AI role-play that gives structured feedback. A final assessment asks you to submit one annotated artifact, three accomplishment statements, and your resume summary. All activities use templates, sample prompts, and clear rubrics so you can complete work without paid tools.
